description: AI agents for commercial and SME banking — trade finance, KYC/KYB, relationship management, process automation for complex corporate workflows.

agents.name: RM Briefing Copilot
agents.description: Generates pre-meeting briefings for commercial RMs — company financials, facility utilisation, recent transactions, news alerts, cross-sell opportunities.
agents.value_narrative: RM prep time from 2 hours to 15 minutes per client meeting

agents.name: Credit Memo Drafter
agents.description: Drafts credit memos from financial data — spread analysis, covenant tracking, risk rating rationale, facility recommendations.
agents.value_narrative: Credit memo drafting from 6 hours to 1 hour

agents.name: KYB Automation Agent
agents.description: Automated Know Your Business — beneficial ownership extraction, corporate structure mapping, UBO verification, risk scoring.
agents.value_narrative: KYB processing from 5 days to same-day for standard cases

agents.name: Trade Finance Document Checker
agents.description: Validates trade documents against UCP 600 / ISBP rules — letters of credit, bills of lading, certificates of origin.
agents.value_narrative: First-pass document checking automated — 70% fewer discrepancies missed

agents.name: Commercial Employee Assistant
agents.description: RM-facing conversational AI for commercial banking — facility lookups, policy queries, pricing guidance, approval routing.
agents.value_narrative: Reduces context-switching across 5+ systems to single conversational interface

agents.name: Covenant Monitoring Agent
agents.description: Automated covenant compliance monitoring — extracts financial data from submissions, flags breaches, generates exception reports.
agents.value_narrative: Real-time covenant monitoring replaces quarterly manual checks

agents.name: AML Transaction Monitoring Triage
agents.description: Triages AML alerts for commercial accounts — enriches with entity data, scores risk, auto-closes clear false positives.
agents.value_narrative: 50% reduction in false positive investigation time

agents.name: Cash Flow Forecasting Agent
agents.description: Generates cash flow forecasts for commercial clients — transaction pattern analysis, seasonal adjustment, liquidity recommendations.
agents.value_narrative: Value-add advisory capability — deepens client relationship
